heading: Rule of construction
label: 11712 Rule of construction
text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to restrict the authority of the State of Hawaii to license health practitioners.
notes: CodificationSection enacted by section 1 of S. 2681, One Hundred Second Congress, as passed by the Senate on , which was enacted into law by . Section 9168, which referred to S. 2681, as passed by the Senate on “”, has been treated as referring to S. 2681, as passed by the Senate on , to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Aug. 7, 1992September 12, 1992Aug. 7, 1992section 9168 of Pub. L. 102–396
